tldr: Pogačar doubled up with a second straight stage win in Vucherens, beating Dorian Godon and Finn Fisher-Black in a reduced-group sprint.

narrative.headline: Pogačar doubles up
narrative.body: Reduced-bunch sprint in Vucherens. Pogačar held position into the closing kilometre and took the kick over Godon and Fisher-Black.

gcImpact.headline: Pogačar extends
gcImpact.body: Stage win plus time bonuses; the GC is now Pogačar's by a margin.
